data.title: Google aims to dismiss lawsuit from publishers over AI search summaries, claiming it's lawful innovation. Defense against year-long lawsuits.
data.description: The tech giant argues that showcasing AI summaries is a legal form of innovation amid ongoing legal battles with publishers.

data.title: Workday research finds 40% of AI time savings lost due to fixing low-quality output. Leaders benefit from investing in both people & technology.
data.description: New global research conducted by Workday, Inc revealed that approximately 40% of time savings from utilizing AI technology is wasted on rectifying low-quality output. The study, released on January 14, 2026, also indicated that organizations achieve a higher return on investment from AI when they invest in both their employees and technology. The findings highlight the importance of enhancing the quality of AI output by combining efforts in workforce development and technological advancements.

data.title: Trump criticizes Dimon's Fed independence views, suggesting higher rates benefit him financially.
data.description: President Donald Trump recently stated that he believes interest rates should be decreased, despite warnings from JPMorgan Chase & Co. CEO Jamie Dimon regarding the potential consequences of political involvement with the Federal Reserve. Trump dismissed Dimon's concerns during a press conference at Joint Base Andrews in Maryland, suggesting that Dimon may benefit financially from higher rates. The full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stan Shih introduces Wangdao Business Philosophy for value stewardship & A-Dan, free GPT Business Advisor.
data.description: In Taipei on January 14, 2026, Stan Shih, the co-founder of Acer Group, introduced his Wangdao Business Philosophy, a contemporary method for making business decisions focused on the stewardship of business value. He also debuted A-Dan, a business advisor utilizing GPT technology.

data.title: Usercentrics buys MCP Manager for AI trust in data privacy, enhancing consent solutions. Leader in Privacy-Led Marketing.
data.description: Usercentrics, a leading provider of Privacy-Led Marketing solutions, has recently acquired MCP Manager, a cutting-edge governance platform for the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The team behind MCP Manager possesses significant AI infrastructure knowledge. This strategic acquisition marks Usercentrics as the primary worldwide market leader in data privacy solutions to integrate consent and data protections into AI-based processes. The merged platform will offer a cohesive Privacy-Led Marketing solution.

data.title: Animoca acquires Somo amid NFT market revival, signaling renewed trading with numbers rising in early 2026.
data.description: Animoca's recent purchase of Somo is seen as a move to bolster its strategy in the digital collectibles space as non-fungible tokens (NFTs) start showing promising signs of increased trading. The acquisition aims to capitalize on the growing interest in NFTs, with the industry witnessing a surge in trading activities in recent times. This strategic move comes at a time when NFTs are gaining traction in the market, with the potential for significant growth in the near future.

data.title: Compare 10 AI video generators, 2026, prices $10-$200/month. Evaluate Runway, Kling AI, OpenAI Sora. Which deliver quality? Read more.
data.description: A detailed evaluation was conducted on 10 AI video generators, such as Runway, Kling AI, and OpenAI Sora. The comparison assessed real pricing, output quality, and effectiveness of each tool. The study aimed to provide insights on which platforms are able to deliver exceptional results in generating AI videos.

data.title: Ontex earns 'A' rating for 2nd year in a row from CDP for climate change transparency.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Aalst, Belgium, Ontex Group NV, listed on Euronext under the symbol ONTEX, has been awarded an 'A' rating by CDP for the second consecutive year. The company, renowned for its personal care solutions, has been recognized by the global environmental non-profit for its exceptional corporate transparency and effectiveness in addressing climate change. This recognition highlights Ontex's commitment to sustainability and marks a significant achievement for the company.

data.title: Earnings per share outlook for 2025 raised to c. DKK 85 due to a clerical error in the financial table.
data.description: An error has been identified in the financial table, where "Q4 2025" mistakenly appeared as "Q4 2024." This correction addresses the issue with the quarter figure for the respective year, highlighting the revised time frame for the financial data. The correction ensures accurate representation in the financial records.

data.title: France identifies 90 unlicensed crypto firms pre-MiCA deadline. 40% won't apply, 30% unresponsive amid regulator warnings for July closures.
data.description: In France, there are a total of 90 cryptocurrency businesses registered without a MiCA license. Among them, 40% have chosen not to pursue the license, while 30% have not responded to regulators. Authorities have issued warnings about potential shutdowns in July for those operating without the required license.
